issues.description: Questions lack accompanying text passages - reading comprehension questions require actual texts to analyze
Multiple choice questions reference unspecified texts, making them impossible to answer without context
Cannot properly assess textual evidence citation skills without providing actual passages to cite from
Missing rubrics or scoring guidelines for extended response questions 6-10
Question 5 may be confusing as it asks students to identify what requires inference rather than making an inference

strengths: Well-structured template with appropriate sections and clear organization
Good progression from multiple choice to extended response format
Questions target both explicit text evidence and inference skills as required by RI.6.1
Extended response questions provide comprehensive coverage of standard requirements
Answer key format is appropriate for grade level
recommendations: Add 2-3 grade-appropriate reading passages of varying genres and lengths
Ensure all multiple choice questions reference specific, provided texts
Include scoring rubrics for questions 6-10 with clear performance criteria
Revise question 5 to be more straightforward about inference identification
Consider adding brief passage excerpts for context in multiple choice section
